name: Ningbo Zhoushan Port Company Limited
summary: Ningbo Zhoushan Port Company Limited engages in the port operation. Its terminal functions include container terminal facilities; iron ore transit transportation system; crude oil terminal; liquid chemical raw material collection base; coal transit and storage base; and cruise terminal services. The company also offers port services, such as pilotage, tugboat parking and berthing, freight forwarding, and cargo handling, including container ship tally, container loading and unpacking, cargo measurement, and cargo damage and verification services. In addition, it provides sea-rail transport logistics, booking and customs declaration, inspection, supervision, and other services; and consolidation, distribution, storage, and warehousing services, as well as issues bills of lading. The company was formerly known as Ningbo Port Co., Ltd. and changed its name of Ningbo Zhoushan Port Company Limited in August 2016. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Ningbo, China. Ningbo Zhoushan Port Company Limited is a subsidiary of Ningbo Zhoushan Port Group Co., Ltd.
